name: Mythiq
description: Mythiq A Card-Based Memory Adventure Through Legendary Realms Enter the enchanting world of Mythiq, where memory meets mythology! Flip, match, and master beautifully illustrated cards featuring dragons, phoenixes, griffins, mermaids, and other legendary creatures from ancient lore. But this isn’t just a simple matching game — each level brings new challenges, magical twists, and increasing difficulty that will test your focus and recall.
